channel.title: CyberNetSec - Phishing
channel.description: Latest phishing threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: QR Code Phishing Surges 146% in Q1 2026, Microsoft Warns
item.description:
According to Microsoft's Q1 2026 threat intelligence report, QR code-based phishing (quishing) has become the fastest-growing email attack vector, with volumes jumping 146% between January and March. Attackers are increasingly hiding malicious QR codes within PDF attachments to bypass email security...

Severity: High

Categories: Phishing, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: ShinyHunters Leaks 1.4 Million Udemy User Records, Including Financial Data, After Failed Extortion
item.description:
The ShinyHunters cybercrime group has publicly leaked a database containing 1.4 million records from the online learning platform Udemy after a 'pay or leak' extortion attempt failed. The compromised data is extensive, including user and instructor PII, contact information, and sensitive financial p...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Phishing

Read Full Article →

item.title: China-Based Silver Fox APT Expands Espionage Campaign Across Asia with Fake Tax Audits
item.description:
The China-based threat group Silver Fox has launched a new wave of attacks targeting businesses and individuals across Asia. The group, which has been active since at least 2022, uses fake tax audit notifications and counterfeit software update alerts to deliver malware. According to analysis by S2W...

Severity: High

Categories: Threat Actor, Cyberattack, Phishing

Read Full Article →

item.title: Rituals Cosmetics Data Breach Exposes Personal Info of 'My Rituals' Members
item.description:
Amsterdam-based luxury cosmetics company Rituals has confirmed a data breach impacting members of its 'My Rituals' loyalty program, which has over 40 million members. The company began notifying affected customers on April 22, 2026, after discovering the incident earlier in the month. Compromised da...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Phishing

Read Full Article →

item.title: Germany Accuses Russia of Orchestrating Large-Scale Signal Phishing Attack on Politicians
item.description:
The German government has officially stated its belief that Russia was behind a widespread and sophisticated phishing campaign targeting the Signal messenger accounts of hundreds of high-profile individuals. The targets included Members of Parliament, government officials, diplomats, and journalists...

Severity: High

Categories: Phishing, Cyberattack, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →

item.title: Hackers Impersonate IT on Microsoft Teams to Deploy 'SNOW' Malware
item.description:
A newly identified threat actor, UNC6692, is conducting sophisticated attacks using a novel social engineering vector. As detailed by Google's Mandiant group, the attackers first create a distraction by flooding a target's inbox with spam emails. They then contact the victim via a Microsoft Teams ch...

Severity: High

Categories: Threat Actor, Malware, Phishing

Read Full Article →

item.title: US Cracks Down on Southeast Asia Cyberscam Networks, Sanctions Cambodian Senator
item.description:
The U.S. government has launched a major, multi-agency crackdown on transnational cyberscam networks operating from Southeast Asia. The initiative, described as a 'new theater of war' against Chinese organized crime, involves sanctions, criminal charges, and asset seizures. The U.S. Treasury has san...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory, Phishing

Read Full Article →

item.title: CISA Warns of 'ShadowProxy' Phishing-as-a-Service that Bypasses MFA
item.description:
The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) and the FBI have issued a joint advisory about the growing threat from 'ShadowProxy,' a sophisticated Phishing-as-a-Service (PhaaS) platform. Sold on dark web forums, ShadowProxy enables even low-skilled criminals to launch large-scale phis...

Severity: High

Categories: Phishing, Threat Intelligence, Security Operations

Read Full Article →

item.title: ADT Confirms Data Breach by ShinyHunters After Vishing Attack Compromises Okta and Salesforce
item.description:
Home security giant ADT has confirmed a data breach orchestrated by the notorious ShinyHunters extortion group. The attackers gained initial access by compromising an employee's Okta single sign-on (SSO) account through a sophisticated voice phishing (vishing) attack. This access allowed them to piv...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Phishing

Read Full Article →

item.title: 26 Malicious 'FakeWallet' Crypto Apps Found on Apple App Store, Stealing Seed Phrases
item.description:
A coordinated malware campaign dubbed "FakeWallet" has been discovered on Apple's official App Store, involving 26 fraudulent applications that impersonated popular cryptocurrency wallets. Active since at least fall 2025, these malicious apps were designed to steal users' sensitive recovery phrases,...

Severity: High

Categories: Malware, Mobile Security, Phishing

Read Full Article →
